description_long: This object is a rectangular, vintage-style radio receiver with a black top and front panel, and brown side panels. The front face features a digital red LED display showing the time '9:00', a frequency scale for AM/FM radio, and several labeled buttons and dials for tuning and control. The top surface has a ribbed texture with large, colored buttons, likely for alarm and radio functions. On one side, a large round tuning knob is visible, while the opposite side has a circular speaker grille. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal components, and the object is compact, suitable for placement on a table or shelf in an urban environment.
description: A compact, rectangular vintage radio receiver with a digital display, colored buttons, a tuning knob, and a side speaker grille. The body is mainly black with brown sides and a ribbed top surface.
description_view_0: The view shows the brown side panel and the ribbed black top, with colored buttons partially visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the digital LED time display, frequency scale, control buttons, and part of the ribbed top.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the large round tuning knob and the brown side panel, with the top buttons also visible.
description_view_3: The rear or opposite side view shows a circular speaker grille on the black panel, with minimal other features visible.
